data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page, which is a specific requirement outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this button. The evidence only discusses bookings made through Instagram, and there is no mention of the Facebook integration or the button itself, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: 'Book Now' button on Facebook page is not confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
